_comment: Common strings used in multiple places, including command descriptions and responses. Edit this file to change them globally. Do not add command-specific strings here.
brand.botDescription: The guild's snarky scribe and resource tracker.
brand.botLongDescription: I keep track of your gold and resources, with a dash of sarcasm for flavor. Use me wisely, adventurer.

notInResourceChannel: 🖋 Wrong parchment. This belongs in the Resource channel.
🖋 My ink only flows in the Resource channel. Try again there.
🖋 Let’s keep the ledger tidy — use the Resource channel for this.
🖋 Misfiled. Take this to the Resource channel, please.
🖋 The ledger isn’t portable. Head to the Resource channel.
🖋 This page isn’t for transactions. Resource channel, if you would.
🖋 I refuse to blot the margins here. Resource channel only.
🖋 Proper filings go in the Resource channel. I don’t make the rules (I do).
🖋 Wrong desk. Resource channel is the counter you want.
🖋 Transactions are recorded in the Resource channel, not here.
🖋 Neat columns live in the Resource channel. Shoo.
🖋 Take it to the Resource channel before the ink sours.
notInChannel: 🖋 My ink only flows in {channel}. Try again there.
🖋 Let’s keep the ledger tidy — use {channel} for this.
🖋 The ledger isn’t portable. Head to {channel}.
🖋 This page isn’t for transactions. {channel}, if you would.
🖋 I refuse to blot the margins here. {channel} only.
🖋 Proper filings go in {channel}. I don’t make the rules (I do).
🖋 Wrong desk. {channel} is the counter you want.
🖋 Transactions are recorded in {channel}, not here.
🖋 Take it to {channel} before the ink sours.
noActiveChar: 🖋 Sorry, there's no active character for {user}. Be sure they've been initiated.
🖋 {user} has no active character. They need to /initiate first.
🖋 No active character found for {user}. Try /initiate.
noRole: 🖋 You don't have the required role for that.
🖋 That action requires a role you don't hold.
🖋 Access denied. The ledger doesn't recognise your credentials.
🖋 Misfiled. You lack the standing to do that.
🖋 The quill hesitates. You're not authorised for this action.

generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
Well, this is embarrassing. Something broke on my end.
I'm having a bit of a malfunction. Please try again later.
Oops! It seems I've encountered an error. Please try again later.

random: Speak up, kiddo! I didn't understand a word you said.
That didn't make a lick of sense.
Perhaps you should try again after the **Feeblemind** has worn off.

notYetImplemented: This feature is still in the forge. Stay tuned!
I'm still learning that trick. Check back later!
Coming soon to a guild near you!
This feature is still being crafted. Please be patient!
I'm still learning that trick. Please check back later!

permission.guild_member_only: You can only use this if you are a registered Guild Member.
